subcodes.first_line: One of the names of God is the Fashioner, and He hath loved and doth love craftsmanship; therefore each one [3.5s]... ...One of the names of God is the Fashioner. He loveth craftsmanship. Therefore any of His servants who manifesteth this attribute is acceptable in the sight of this Wronged One
subcodes.first_line_orig: یک اسم از اسماء الهی صانع است و صنعت را بسیار دوست داشته و میدارد لذا هر یک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @work as worship, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
